story.title: Lemonade Stand Stocks
story.description: Learn how owning a piece of a company works
story.storyContent: Emma's friend Leo started a lemonade stand. Emma gave him $5 to buy lemons and sugar. In return, Leo promised to share half of his profits. That's like owning a small piece of Leo's business. Emma learned that a stock is a tiny share of a company. If the company does well, the stock can grow in value. She decided to hold her share for a long time, not sell it quickly. Over a year, Leo's lemonade stand became popular, and Emma's $5 turned into $8. She learned that patience and research make stock investing rewarding.

quizzes.title: Stock Basics Quiz 1
quizzes.t2qContent:
> Emma: What is a stock?

? What did Emma receive when she gave Leo $5?
1) A loan to be repaid next week
2) A tiny share of Leo's business
3) A free lemonade every day
= 2

> Emma: Correct! A stock is partial ownership.

? How did Emma's $5 turn into $8?
1) Leo gave her extra money as a gift
2) The business grew and her share became more valuable
3) She won a lottery
= 2

> Emma: Yes! When the company does well, your stock can increase in value.

? What is a smart approach to stocks shown in the story?
1) Sell immediately after buying
2) Hold for a long time with patience
3) Only buy stocks that cost less than $1
= 2

> Emma: Patience and research are key. Think long term!

quizzes.title: Stock Basics Quiz 2
quizzes.t2qContent:
> Emma: Test yourself again!

? What does owning a stock mean?
1) You own a small part of the company
2) You have to work for the company
3) The company owes you money back
= 1

> Emma: Yes, you become a partial owner.

? What can happen if the company grows?
1) Your stock value may increase
2) You lose all your money guaranteed
3) The company takes your stock back
= 1

> Emma: Growth can increase your stock's worth.

? What helped Emma's stock grow?
1) Leo's business became popular
2) Emma sold her share on the first day
3) Emma borrowed more money
= 1

> Emma: Business success helps stock value rise.

quizzes.title: Stock Basics Quiz 3
quizzes.t2qContent:
> Emma: One more round!

? Should you buy stocks without research?
1) Yes, always buy what others buy
2) No, research the company first
3) Only buy if the price is very low
= 2

> Emma: Research helps you make informed decisions.

? What is a good attitude toward stock investing?
1) Get rich overnight
2) Be patient and think long term
3) Never invest in anything
= 2

> Emma: Patience and long-term thinking are best.

? Emma's $5 grew to $8. What does this show?
1) Stocks always double your money quickly
2) Stocks can grow slowly over time with a good business
3) You should only buy lemonade stands
= 2

> Emma: Slow, steady growth from a good business is realistic.

story.title: Saham Kedai Jus Buah
story.description: Belajar bagaimana memiliki sebagian kecil perusahaan
story.storyContent: Rina membantu temannya, Budi, membuka kedai jus buah. Rina memberikan Rp50.000 untuk membeli buah-buahan. Sebagai imbalan, Budi berjanji akan berbagi 20% keuntungannya. Itulah yang disebut saham – memiliki bagian kecil dari bisnis. Rina belajar bahwa jika kedai jus itu maju, nilai sahamnya bisa naik. Dia memutuskan untuk tidak menjual cepat-cepat. Setahun kemudian, kedai jus Budi terkenal, dan Rp50.000 Rina menjadi Rp75.000. Rina sadar bahwa kesabaran dan belajar tentang perusahaan membuat investasi saham menyenangkan dan positif.

quizzes.title: Kuis Saham Dasar 1
quizzes.t2qContent:
> Rina: Apa itu saham?

? Apa yang Rina terima saat memberi Rp50.000 ke Budi?
1) Hutang yang harus dibayar minggu depan
2) Bagian kecil dari bisnis Budi
3) Jus gratis setiap hari
= 2

> Rina: Benar! Saham adalah kepemilikan kecil perusahaan.

? Mengapa Rp50.000 Rina menjadi Rp75.000?
1) Budi memberi hadiah uang
2) Bisnis berkembang dan nilai saham naik
3) Rina menang undian
= 2

> Rina: Ya! Saat perusahaan maju, saham bisa naik nilainya.

? Sikap cerdas terhadap saham menurut cerita?
1) Jual segera setelah beli
2) Simpan dengan sabar untuk jangka panjang
3) Hanya beli saham murah
= 2

> Rina: Kesabaran dan riset penting. Pikir jangka panjang!

quizzes.title: Kuis Saham Dasar 2
quizzes.t2qContent:
> Rina: Uji dirimu lagi!

? Memiliki saham artinya?
1) Kamu punya sebagian kecil perusahaan
2) Kamu harus bekerja di perusahaan itu
3) Perusahaan berhutang padamu
= 1

> Rina: Betul, kamu jadi pemilik kecil.

? Apa yang bisa terjadi jika perusahaan berkembang?
1) Nilai sahammu bisa naik
2) Kamu pasti rugi semua uang
3) Perusahaan mengambil sahammu kembali
= 1

> Rina: Perkembangan perusahaan bisa menaikkan nilai saham.

? Apa yang membuat saham Rina naik?
1) Kedai jus Budi menjadi populer
2) Rina menjual saham di hari pertama
3) Rina meminjam uang lagi
= 1

> Rina: Kesuksesan bisnis membantu nilai saham naik.

quizzes.title: Kuis Saham Dasar 3
quizzes.t2qContent:
> Rina: Satu putaran lagi!

? Apakah sebaiknya beli saham tanpa riset?
1) Ya, selalu beli yang dibeli orang lain
2) Tidak, riset perusahaan dulu
3) Hanya beli jika harga murah sekali
= 2

> Rina: Riset membantu keputusan bijak.

? Sikap baik dalam investasi saham?
1) Kaya dalam semalam
2) Sabar dan pikir jangka panjang
3) Tidak pernah investasi apapun
= 2

> Rina: Kesabaran dan jangka panjang adalah kunci.

? Rp50.000 Rina menjadi Rp75.000. Ini menunjukkan?
1) Saham selalu menggandakan uang dengan cepat
2) Saham bisa tumbuh perlahan dengan bisnis yang bagus
3) Kamu hanya boleh beli kedai jus
= 2

> Rina: Pertumbuhan lambat tapi pasti dari bisnis baik itu realistis.

story.title: 柠檬水摊位股票
story.description: 学习如何拥有一家公司的微小部分
story.storyContent: 小美的朋友小刚开了一个柠檬水摊。小美给了小刚50元买柠檬和糖。小刚答应分一半利润给她。这就是股票——拥有一家生意的一小部分。小美学到：如果公司做得好，股票价值就会增长。她决定长期持有，不急着卖。一年后，小刚的柠檬水摊很受欢迎，小美的50元变成了80元。她明白了：耐心和研究让股票投资变得有价值。

quizzes.title: 股票基础知识测验1
quizzes.t2qContent:
> 小美：什么是股票？

? 小美给了小刚50元，换来了什么？
1) 下周要还的借款
2) 小刚生意的一小部分
3) 每天一杯免费柠檬水
= 2

> 小美：正确！股票就是部分所有权。

? 小美的50元怎么变成了80元？
1) 小刚额外给了她钱作为礼物
2) 生意变好，她的那部分变得更值钱
3) 她中了彩票
= 2

> 小美：对！公司发展好，股票价值就会上升。

? 故事中展示的聪明的股票投资方法是什么？
1) 买完立刻卖掉
2) 耐心长期持有
3) 只买低于1元的股票
= 2

> 小美：耐心和研究是关键。长期思考！

quizzes.title: 股票基础知识测验2
quizzes.t2qContent:
> 小美：再测试一下自己！

? 拥有一只股票意味着什么？
1) 你拥有公司的一小部分
2) 你必须为公司工作
3) 公司欠你钱
= 1

> 小美：是的，你成为了小老板。

? 如果公司发展得好，可能会发生什么？
1) 你的股票价值可能上升
2) 你一定会亏光所有钱
3) 公司会把你的股票收回
= 1

> 小美：公司成长能让你的股票更值钱。

? 是什么让小美的股票增长了？
1) 小刚的柠檬水摊变得受欢迎
2) 小美第一天就把股票卖了
3) 小美借了更多钱
= 1

> 小美：生意成功帮助股票价值上升。

quizzes.title: 股票基础知识测验3
quizzes.t2qContent:
> 小美：最后一轮！

? 你该不该不做研究就买股票？
1) 应该，别人买什么我就买什么
2) 不应该，先研究公司
3) 只在价格非常低的时候买
= 2

> 小美：研究帮助你做出明智的决定。

? 对股票投资的好态度是什么？
1) 一夜暴富
2) 耐心和长期思考
3) 永远不投资任何东西
= 2

> 小美：耐心和长期思考最棒。

? 小美的50元变成80元，这说明了什么？
1) 股票总是能快速翻倍
2) 股票可以随着好生意慢慢增长
3) 你只应该投资柠檬水摊
= 2

> 小美：好生意带来的缓慢稳定增长是现实的。
